instruction: Compress every file under ~/{DIR} into a single zip archive at ~/{ARCHIVE}.zip.
source: adapted:osworld:37887e8c-da15-4192-923c-08fa390a176d mode=port; OSWorld os 'compress files under a directory into an archive' is a generic archiving task; maps to Finder (Compress) / Terminal (zip) with a Tier-A exec getter that lists the archive's entries
